top_items.title: Ensure accurate meeting records with automatic language detection in Google Meet
top_items.one_liner: Google Meet now auto-detects spoken language for more accurate transcripts, captions, and summarized notes.

top_items.title: New ways to migrate and scale Red Hat OpenShift on Google Cloud
top_items.one_liner: Details how Google Cloud facilitates secure, scalable migration and modernization of Red Hat OpenShift workloads.

top_items.title: Manhattan Associates powers over a billion daily API calls with Google Cloud databases
top_items.one_liner: Manhattan Associates scales to over a billion daily API calls using Cloud SQL and BigQuery on GCP.
